app.title: EcoMentor AI
app.tagline: Your Personal Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform
form.name: Your Name
landing.hero.title: Reduce Your Carbon Footprint With AI
landing.hero.subtitle: EcoMentor AI uses advanced machine learning to analyze your daily habits, calculate your carbon emissions, and provide personalized, actionable coaching to help you live a greener life.
landing.why.title: Why Must We Act Now?
landing.why.desc: Our planet is at a critical tipping point. The carbon footprint we leave behind today directly dictates the world our children will inherit tomorrow. Every choice we make matters.
landing.consequences.title: The Cost of Inaction
landing.consequences.1.title: Extreme Weather
landing.consequences.1.desc: Rising global temperatures lead to devastating hurricanes, unmanageable wildfires, and severe droughts that threaten global food supplies.
landing.consequences.2.title: Rising Sea Levels
landing.consequences.2.desc: Melting polar ice caps threaten coastal cities. Millions of people will be displaced, creating unprecedented climate refugee crises.
landing.consequences.3.title: Loss of Biodiversity
landing.consequences.3.desc: Ecosystems are collapsing. The generation coming after us may never see coral reefs or countless species currently facing extinction.
landing.future.title: Protecting the Next Generation
landing.future.desc: If we don't drastically reduce our carbon emissions, the Earth will become increasingly uninhabitable. We are borrowing this planet from future generations. By taking accountability today, we can preserve the beauty, resources, and livability of Earth for the children of tomorrow.
landing.features.title: How EcoMentor Helps You
landing.features.ai.title: AI Carbon Coach
landing.features.ai.desc: Get personalized, AI-driven recommendations based on your exact lifestyle choices powered by Google Gemini.
landing.features.dashboard.title: Interactive Dashboard
landing.features.dashboard.desc: Visualize your impact through detailed charts and a calculated 'Green Score' to track your progress.
landing.features.challenges.title: Gamified Challenges
landing.features.challenges.desc: Turn sustainability into a habit with weekly eco-challenges and progress streaks.
landing.features.tree.title: Eco Growth Tree
landing.features.tree.desc: Watch your real-time carbon savings grow into a beautiful animated tree as you log daily eco-actions.
landing.features.scanner.title: Product Scanner
landing.features.scanner.desc: Scan barcodes to instantly see the eco-impact of products before you buy using our AI vision tool.
landing.features.offset.title: Carbon Offset & Budgeting
landing.features.offset.desc: Set monthly CO₂ limits and neutralize bad days with actionable redemption tasks to offset your footprint.
